enemies.name: Drifter
enemies.plain_description: A slow chaser that teaches movement.
enemies.technical_description: Basic enemy archetype. Moves toward the player with low speed and low contact damage.

enemies.name: Burrower
enemies.plain_description: Waits, appears near the player, then creates light pressure.
enemies.technical_description: Delayed ambusher. Spawn warning should precede activation.

enemies.name: Grazer
enemies.plain_description: Wanders toward interesting drops and makes the meadow feel alive.
enemies.technical_description: Soft-chaos enemy. Wanders and may bias movement toward pickups/resources later.

enemies.name: The Hungry Stag
enemies.plain_description: A slow, readable mini-boss that charges, pauses, and calls Drifters.
enemies.technical_description: MVP build check. Needs clear telegraphs, gentle pacing, and summon windows.
